title: Baby Bear Nap Schedule
text:
## Baby Bear Nap Protocol

**Pre-nap:**
- {adjective} story
- {adjective} honey on toast

**Music:** Soft {adjective} songs from the {adjective} collection.

**Room:** Must be {adjective}, quiet, and free of {plural noun} toys.

**Duration:** Baby Bear will {verb} for exactly {number} minutes unless a {adjective} butterfly appears.

**Wake-up:** Stretching, yawning, and asking for another {object}.

**If Baby joins:** Both may {verb} until someone finds the {adjective} blanket.

**Do not** schedule meetings during {adjective} hour.
